title: Portrait Photography
shortDescription: Professional portraits that reveal character, dignity, and story.
longDescription: Professional portraits tailored for individuals, families, corporate leaders, and creative portfolios. Sessions take place in our premium climate-controlled Ibadan studio or at an outdoor location of your choice, backed by state-of-the-art lighting and high-end retouching.
message: Hello Royal Priest Studios, I'd like to book a Portrait Photography session.

title: Event Videography
shortDescription: Full-coverage cinematic documentation of your milestone events.
longDescription: High-definition, multicam cinematic documentation for events ranging from church programs to corporate launch events. Our packages ensure crystal clear high-fidelity ambient sound capture alongside edited event recaps.
message: Hello Royal Priest Studios, I'd like to book Event Videography coverage.

title: Wedding Coverage
shortDescription: Luxury wedding photography and videography preserving every sacred detail.
longDescription: An elite, fully-managed visual production preserving every memory from your traditional wedding to the white wedding ceremony. Includes multiple camera teams, drone aerial framing, and premium color grading.

milestones.label: Final Review (Prior to digital gallery delivery)

message: Hello Royal Priest Studios, I'd like to enquire about Wedding Coverage.

title: Ministry Media
shortDescription: Dedicated media coverage for church programs, crusades, and ministry events.
longDescription: We understand the flow of spiritual programs. Our team provides specialized media setups that capture the move of God seamlessly, optimizing sound feeds from soundboards and providing high-definition video archives ready for broadcast.
message: Hello Royal Priest Studios, I'd like to book Ministry Media coverage.

title: Corporate Shoots
shortDescription: Brand photography and video content that positions your business with authority.
longDescription: From executive headshots to architectural office photography, we construct high-authority corporate visual identities perfect for websites, annual reports, and LinkedIn presentation layouts.
message: Hello Royal Priest Studios, I'd like to book a Corporate Shoot.

title: Post Production
shortDescription: Expert editing, color grading, and mixing that elevates raw stems or media files.
longDescription: Send us your raw audio stems or raw video files from anywhere. Our engineering desk specializes in advanced vocal tuning, surgical EQ mixing, and stylized video color-grading workflows to bring out professional-grade finishes.
message: Hello Royal Priest Studios, I'd like to enquire about Post Production services.

title: Creative Art Direction
shortDescription: Concept development and styling for unique editorial shoots.
longDescription: A collaborative session bringing high-art aesthetics to fashion, music album art, or thematic branding structures. We assist from mood-board ideation down to props and background coordination.
message: Hello Royal Priest Studios, I'd like to collaborate on Creative Art Direction.

title: Maternity & Newborn
shortDescription: Capturing the tender beginnings of life with patience and artistic softness.
longDescription: A dedicated, unhurried photo experience designed to protect baby safety and parental comfort. Perfect for capturing precious maternity expressions and sweet newborn milestones with soft, ethereal textures.
message: Hello Royal Priest Studios, I'd like to book a Maternity/Newborn session.

title: Documentary Filming
shortDescription: In-depth storytelling for non-profits, organizations, and corporate legacies.
longDescription: Complete visual journalism assets tracking social impact stories, corporate retrospectives, or biography logs. Includes structured interview audio design, b-roll architecture, and narrative pacing edits.
message: Hello Royal Priest Studios, I'm interested in a Documentary Filming project.

title: Graduation Packages
shortDescription: Commemorative photoshoots for graduates to celebrate academic milestones.
longDescription: High-clarity solo gown portraits and family celebratory shots on-campus or in-studio. Designed to preserve academic accomplishments with clean, dynamic visual finishes.
message: Hello Royal Priest Studios, I'd like to book a Graduation photoshoot.
